title: Refined Tools
description: This resourcepack enhances the tools and weapons by giving them refined 3D models.
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31d7bc8ff0b36fc90e98b577b2d80e53d48b80f2.png)
[![Discord Server](https://img.shields.io/discord/1446530427337576541?style=for-the-badge&logo=Discord&logoColor=white&label=Discord&color=728ADA)](https://discord.gg/2P8kfceSmt) [![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1419290?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white&label=curseforge&color=F16436)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/refined-tools) [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/6l1WUegn?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&label=Modrinth&color=1CD96A)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/refined-tools)
![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/899c0e364c509449cd21d46c78cd5a7775ff9951.png) This resource pack transforms the tools and weapons, giving them a enhanced 3D look. By default, the GUI models will remain 2D, making it compatible with other resource packs that change the sprites. I highly recommend [Tools Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tools-reimagined) or [Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reimagined) or [Fresh weapons and tools](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-weapons-and-tools) along with this pack! If you want Enchantment Outlines on my tools you can use one of those mods: [Enchantment Glint Outline](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-glint-outline), [Outline Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/outlinemod)
![Important](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6570fc1c8af37836ab6d9863e9b10a47862ff43.png)
Recommended Mods
Required Mods on 1.21.5 and below
